rulings.Case Title: WILLIAMS VS A P GREEN INDUSTRIES INC*
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY.

rulings.Calendar Matter: To Quash Service Of Summons & To Dismiss Complaint (Ccp418.10)
rulings.Rulings: GRANT, IF MOVANT PRODUCES TIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE AT HEARING, OTHERWISE OFF CALENDAR. THE FILED PROOF OF SERVICE INDICATES 23 DAYS SERVICE BY MAIL - NOT 26 AS REQUIRED.

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF WRITTEN AND ORAL AGREEMENTS, THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE, AND THE 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTIES, AS NO SUCH DUTIES ARE ESTABLISHED, AND AS TO THE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT MAINTENANCE OF ELEVATORS, AS NEITHER DUTY NOR DAMAGES ARE ESTABLISHED. MOTION TO STRIKE THE ENTIRE COMPLAINT IS DENIED; THE MOTION TO STRIKE SPECIFIC PORTIONS OF THE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED IN FULL. (JH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder To Motion To Strike Filed By Defts Berkowitz And Grant Building Company, Llc
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO STRIKE THE ENTIRE COMPLAINT IS DENIED; THE MOTION TO STRIKE SPECIFIC PORTIONS OF THE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED IN FULL. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: JACOBSON VS VAHDANI CONSTRUCTION CO INC
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
rulings.Rulings: OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY.

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION BAD FAITH DELAY - MOVING PARTY FAILS TO SHIFT BURDEN. NO DECLARATION FROM EXPERT RE PROPER CLAIM HANDLING. GRANT SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. DENY SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO PUNITIVE DAMAGES. (AA)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Granting Leave For Petitioner To File Complaint In Intervention In The Workers' Compensation Complaint
rulings.Rulings: GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED.

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
rulings.Rulings: GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER RE CCP 437C(G).

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO AMEND GRANTED ON CONDITION PLAINTIFF DOES NOT OPPOSE TWO MONTH CONTINUANCE OF TRIAL DATE AND DELETES ALLEGATIONS RE INTIMIDATION OF WITNESSES. (AA)

rulings.Case Title: JAE LEE et al VS. CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Supplemental Petition
rulings.Rulings: PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE DENIED. COURT FINDS STANDARD OF REVIEW TO BE: "DOES SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE SUPPORT FINDINGS OF HEARING OFFICER?" SEE ZUNIGA VS. SAN MATEO DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH SERVICES 218 CAL.APP.3RD 1521, 1530. COURT CONCLUDES THERE IS SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE TO SUPPORT FINDINGS. (KS(EX))
